---
title: "Resume"
---

# Professional Summary

I’m a cybersecurity professional focused on governance, risk, and data privacy, with 4 years of experience across compliance, third-party risk management, and audit support. Based in Burnaby (Metro Vancouver), I’m completing an MBA at University Canada West (2026) to strengthen strategic and leadership capabilities.

# Professional Experience

## Information Security Consultant
**Security First** | São Paulo, Brazil | 2020

- Supported cybersecurity and governance-related assessments.
- Reviewed documentation, control evidence, and risk-related materials.
- Contributed to audit preparation, reporting, and stakeholder communication.
- Assisted with the organization of findings, remediation items, and compliance-related activities.

## Technical Operations / Electrical & Automation
**TT Eletricas** | São Paulo, Brazil | 2014-2023

- Worked with technical systems, operational routines, and process execution.
- Coordinated tasks across teams and maintained service quality.
- Developed strong problem-solving, discipline, and process-awareness skills.

## Earlier Career in Communications / Customer-Facing Roles
**Kreab&Kavin Anderson** | São Paulo, Brazil | 2012-2014

- Built communication, adaptability, and client-facing skills.
- Managed priorities in fast-paced environments.
- Strengthened teamwork, professionalism, and service orientation.

# Education

## Master of Business Administration (MBA)
**University Canada West**  
Expected completion: [April 2026]

Relevant coursework:

- AI for Business
- Machine Learning for Business
- Cloud Computing (AWS Foundation)
- Strategic Management
- Leadership
- Business Analytics
- Operations Management
- Digital Transformation

## BSc Social Communication (Journalism) 
**Centro Univesitário FIEO (Brazil)**  

Relevant coursework:

- Business Communication
- Strategic Communication
- Interview and research techniques
- BusinessWriting and editing
- Media and public relations
- Communication ethics and law
- Communication theory
- TV and radio production

# Certifications

- EXIN Information Security Foundation
- SENAI - Certified Electrician
- SENAI - Building Automation and Electronic Security Systems
- SENAI - Electrical Control Systems

# Resume Download

[Download PDF Resume](resume.pdf)
